iris_welcome.accessibility_text: The Iris awakens and recognizes your perspective.

iris_idle.accessibility_text: The Iris remains present and attentive.

iris_ready.accessibility_text: The Iris is ready. A memory is waiting.

iris_return.text: You came back with more of the pattern.
iris_return.accessibility_text: The Iris acknowledges your return from the memory field.

truth_fragment_absorbed.accessibility_text: The Iris absorbs a recovered truth fragment from the restored memory.

wm001_observe.text: Stay with the light. It is trying to remember its order.
wm001_observe.accessibility_text: The Iris guides you to observe the light and the painter before interacting.

wm001_fracture_prompt.text: Do not look for a mistake. Look for what arrived too soon.
wm001_fracture_prompt.accessibility_text: The Iris directs attention to an impossible ordering in the memory.

wm001_fracture_found.text: Yes. The color came before its source.
wm001_fracture_found.accessibility_text: The Iris confirms that you located the memory fracture.

wm001_synchronize.text: Hold it with me. Let the light arrive in its own time.
wm001_synchronize.accessibility_text: The Iris asks you to hold focus while the memory stabilizes.

wm001_revelation.text: What was lost was waiting to be seen.
wm001_revelation.accessibility_text: The Iris recognizes the recovered meaning of Clara's light.

archive_fragment_viewed.text: Some memories disappear because nobody was there to witness them.
archive_fragment_viewed.accessibility_text: The Iris reflects on the recovered memory you are viewing.

borrowed_light_reflection.text: Some memories disappear because nobody was there to witness them.
borrowed_light_reflection.accessibility_text: The Iris reflects on the recovered truth called Borrowed Light.
